form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th on April 14 over 342m at Angle Park behind South King beaten 6 lengths (20.58) in a Other. Placed two back at Angle Park. Capable of improvement on latest effort. Well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 17 over 395m at Murray Bridge behind Conqueror beaten 9 lengths (22.96) in a Grade 6. Should be right in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced wide turn into home straight.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (20.19) over 342m at Angle Park. Tricky draw to overcome. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (20.01) over 342m at Angle Park. Boxed out wide and looks tested this line up.

form.formComment: Could only manage fourth last time but the start prior hit the frame at double figure odds when third (23.16) over 400m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw but is worth plenty of thought.
